mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant (name, code, status, quota_config, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{status}, #{quotaConfig}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, status = #{status}, quota_config = #{quotaConfig}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
